subject: fix(docs): update all docs for combo themes, add localStorage migration
body:
- Fix fantasy metaColor: #6e0b75 → #6d0076 (auto-generated by script)
- Add one-time localStorage migration from old lightTheme/darkTheme keys
  to themeCombo key (both in index.html flash prevention + useDarkMode hook)
- Update TutorialModal: describe combo picker instead of per-mode dropdown
- Update STYLE_GUIDE: combo system docs, remove 16-theme references
- Update USER_GUIDE: combo-based theme description
- Update TESTING_GUIDE: rewrite TH2 for combo selection, TH3 for combo
  recovery, remove TH4 keyboard nav test (no dropdown to navigate)
- Update HISTORY.md: add 2026-04-03 changelog entry
- Update TODO.md: remove "Split useDarkMode" (resolved), update Context item
- Update README.md: 2 theme combos
- Update SESSION_NOTES.md: current session context

Tags: docs, themes, migration, daisyui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-combos
Semver: patch

title: update all docs for combo themes, add localStorage migration
